description: Machine-readable pin of every vendored dependency under third_party/. scripts/license_scan.py enforces 1:1 correspondence in CI (spec section 15, constraint 1). Allowed licenses: MIT/BSD/Apache/zlib preferred; LGPL only if dynamically linked; no proprietary SDKs.

dependencies.name: xxhash
dependencies.role: content hashing (interned Name ids; journal/golden hashes later)

dependencies.name: fast_float
dependencies.role: correctly-rounded locale-free double parsing (core JSON; old libc++ has no FP from_chars)

dependencies.name: dragonbox
dependencies.role: shortest round-trip double digits (core JSON emission, byte-identical on every platform)

dependencies.name: quickjs-ng
dependencies.role: embedded JS engine for the TypeScript script tier (spec section 7; JIT-less by design for iOS; core library only — quickjs-libc is deliberately NOT vendored, so scripts have no OS/filesystem/timer surface)

dependencies.name: typescript
dependencies.role: TypeScript compiler vendored AS DATA (typescript.js runs on the embedded QuickJS — no Node anywhere, Aurora D-11) + the lib.es2020 d.ts closure it typechecks against; never compiled or linked

dependencies.name: JoltPhysics
dependencies.role: THE physics engine (spec section 6); minimal deterministic server in M0 (core/physics). Vendored subset: the Jolt/ library tree only, byte-pristine — no samples/tests/viewer; ObjectStream/ is on disk but not compiled (ENABLE_OBJECT_STREAM=OFF shape). Built with JPH_CROSS_PLATFORM_DETERMINISTIC under the repo FP contract (D-BUILD-073)

dependencies.name: rapidyaml
dependencies.role: strict-YAML parsing for the PERMANENT loader subset (core/loader, m0-yaml-loader-run). Vendored as the upstream amalgamated single header (release asset rapidyaml-0.15.2.hpp, byte-pristine) plus ryml.cpp, the one TU defining RYML_SINGLE_HDR_DEFINE_NOW per upstream convention. Chosen over yaml-cpp (exception-driven API, weak location reporting) and libfyaml (C, heavier surface) for structured parse-error locations, callback-based error handling, and MIT (D-BUILD-076)

dependencies.name: Vulkan-Headers
dependencies.role: Vulkan C API declarations for the RHI Vulkan backend (core/rhi/vulkan, m0-rhi-vulkan). Minimal set: vulkan.h + vulkan_core.h + vk_platform.h + the vk_video/ std headers vulkan_core.h includes; the C++ bindings (vulkan.hpp, ~20 MB) are deliberately not vendored. Headers are Apache-2.0 OR MIT upstream; Apache-2.0 selected. Consumed with VK_NO_PROTOTYPES — all entry points resolve through volk at runtime

dependencies.name: volk
dependencies.role: Vulkan meta-loader (core/rhi/vulkan): dlopens the platform loader and resolves every entry point via vkGet*ProcAddr, so the engine never links libvulkan and starts cleanly on ICD-less hosts (rhi probe reports unavailable instead of a dynamic-linker failure)

dependencies.name: VulkanMemoryAllocator
dependencies.role: GPU memory allocation for the Vulkan backend (core/rhi/vulkan). Header-only upstream, byte-pristine; the one deviation is vma_impl.cpp, the upstream-documented single VMA_IMPLEMENTATION TU, kept inside third_party/ so the header body never enters first-party lint. Dynamic Vulkan functions only (VMA_DYNAMIC_VULKAN_FUNCTIONS=1 via volk)

dependencies.name: glslang
dependencies.role: GLSL -> SPIR-V compilation (core/rhi/shadercomp, spec section 5). Minimal source set: MachineIndependent (+preprocessor), GenericCodeGen, OSDependent Unix+Windows, ResourceLimits, SPIRV backend — C++ API only; no HLSL front-end (upstream-deprecated), no C interface TUs, no SPIRV-Tools optimizer (ENABLE_OPT off), no StandAlone tools or tests. glslang/build_info.h is GENERATED at vendor time with upstream's build_info.py from CHANGES.md (the one non-pristine file, zstd-amalgamation precedent, D-BUILD-031); regenerate with: python3 build_info.py <checkout> -i build_info.h.tmpl -o glslang/build_info.h. Upstream is multi-licensed (BSD-3-Clause/Apache-2.0/MIT per file, see LICENSE.txt); BSD-3-Clause is the covering grant for the vendored set. Compiled under the deterministic-FP contract: GLSL constant folding happens here and SPIR-V bytes must not vary by host toolchain

dependencies.name: SPIRV-Cross
dependencies.role: SPIR-V -> MSL translation for the native Metal backend (core/rhi/shadercomp, m0-rhi-metal; spec section 5: shaders compile once to SPIR-V, per-backend translation). Same Khronos SDK-family pin as Vulkan-Headers/volk/glslang. Minimal separable set under spirv_cross/: core IR (spirv_cross/parser/parsed_ir/cfg) + GLSL backend (MSL derives from it) + MSL backend + spirv.hpp/GLSL.std.450.h/NonSemanticShaderDebugInfo100.h - no HLSL, no reflection, no C API, no util, no CLI, byte-pristine. Upstream is Apache-2.0 OR MIT; Apache-2.0 selected. Compiled under the deterministic-FP contract: shader constant folding happens here and emitted MSL text must not vary by host toolchain

dependencies.name: stb
dependencies.role: PNG transport for the golden pillar (core/rhi): stb_image_write ENCODES render-to-image output (m0-rhi-vulkan), stb_image DECODES it for two-tier comparison (m0-golden-compare, PNG-only + no-stdio configuration). Golden hashes are DECODED PIXELS, never encoded bytes (Aurora D-14) — the PNG is the human-inspectable artifact. Dual-licensed MIT / public domain upstream; MIT selected. stb_image_write_impl.c / stb_image_impl.c are the upstream-documented single implementation TUs (vma_impl.cpp precedent). EXR (tinyexr) deliberately deferred: no M0 consumer (D-BUILD-005 ethos)

dependencies.name: zstd
dependencies.role: journal stream compression (run.mrj journal.jsonl.zst; single-file amalgamation from upstream build/single_file_libs, regenerated with ZSTD_MULTITHREAD removed for deterministic single-threaded output, D-BUILD-031)
